benefits.description: Achieved a tan after 60 days; able to spend extended time in Australian sun without burning
Felt less need to eat, felt more full; weight dropped from 101kg to 98kg
Increased arousal, more sexually active, heightened sensitivity to smell of women's perfumes
Beard regrowth color changed from ginger to dark brown
Heavier sleeping, felt like required more sleep

side_effects.description: Painful throbbing erections lasting 40 minutes to 6 hours; at 2500mcg dose caused a painful 6-hour erection
Increased irritability, quicker to anger; learned to control over time
Freckles darkened significantly, approximately 30 new freckles appeared; subsided after 20 days
Delayed sleep cycle when injecting at night; switched to daytime injections to mitigate
Face felt flushed and tingly feeling within 10 minutes of first injection
Occasional small drops of blood and redness at injection site on some days
Skin spots, scars, and birthmarks became more prominent

protocol_notes: Spanish/Scottish/English/French ancestry with 1/128 aboriginal; 5ft11, skin type 1, MC1r gene, ginger facial hair. Reconstituted with 2ml water per vial; each unit = 50mcg. Used 7 vials over 65 days. Typical daily dose 1000mcg; range 500mcg to 2500mcg. Total natural tanning time 18-19 hours over 60 days. Located in Melbourne, Australia. Started 23 Jan 2019. Obtained MT2 via Australian pharmacy/doctor referral after pre-assessment. Switched to once-weekly maintenance dosing after loading phase. Total cost ~$800 AUD including MT2, insulin needles, and swabs.
